privacy_classes.safe: Stable IDs, route patterns, counts, booleans, enums, buckets, durations.
privacy_classes.operational: Hashed IDs and minimal metadata for sensitive features (case management).
privacy_classes.platform: Service health, latency, errors — never user-identifying.

events.name: page_engagement_tick
events.trigger: every 20s while tab visible & user active

events.name: dead_click_detected
events.trigger: click produces no DOM change in 500ms

alerts.title: Sudden drop in new Street Profiles
